# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No specific build command provided. Example: mvn clean install"', description: 'Shell command to execute for building the project.')
        string(name: 'TEST_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No specific test command provided. Example: mvn test"', description: 'Shell command to execute for running tests.')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No specific deployment command provided. Example: docker push my-repo/my-app:latest"', description: 'Shell command to execute for deploying the project.')
        string(name: 'CLEANUP_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No specific cleanup command provided. Example: rm -rf target"', description: 'Shell command to execute for post-build cleanup.')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.BUILD_COMMAND && params.BUILD_COMMAND.trim() != '') {
                        echo "Executing build command: ${params.BUILD_COMMAND}"
                        sh params.BUILD_COMMAND
                    } else {
                        echo 'BUILD_COMMAND parameter is empty. Skipping build stage.'
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.TEST_COMMAND && params.TEST_COMMAND.trim() != '') {
                        echo "Executing test command: ${params.TEST_COMMAND}"
                        sh params.TEST_COMMAND
                    } else {
                        echo 'TEST_COMMAND parameter is empty. Skipping test stage.'
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.DEPLOY_COMMAND && params.DEPLOY_COMMAND.trim() != '') {
                        echo "Executing deploy command: ${params.DEPLOY_COMMAND}"
                        sh params.DEPLOY_COMMAND
                    } else {
                        echo 'DEPLOY_COMMAND parameter is empty. Skipping deploy stage.'
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    post {
        always {
            script {
                if (params.CLEANUP_COMMAND && params.CLEANUP_COMMAND.trim() != '') {
                    echo "Executing cleanup command: ${params.CLEANUP_COMMAND}"
                    sh params.CLEANUP_COMMAND
                } else {
                    echo 'CLEANUP_COMMAND parameter is empty. No specific cleanup command to run.'
                }
            }
        }
        success {
            echo 'Pipeline finished successfully!'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Pipeline failed!'
        }
    }
}
